headlines.title: I-405 Construction Impacts Shift South as Work Continues
headlines.summary: WSDOT reports that construction impacts have shifted south on I-405 with ongoing work from March 20-23. The work includes tunnel maintenance causing longer backups approaching Bellevue in both directions, with congestion extending throughout the I-405 corridor. Delays are also possible on SR 520 ramps connecting to southbound I-405.

headlines.title: Multi-Vehicle Collision Blocks All Lanes of Northbound I-5 Near Sea-Tac Airport
headlines.summary: All lanes of northbound I-5 near the Seattle-Tacoma International Airport were blocked early Monday morning due to a multi-vehicle collision. Commuters faced significant delays during the morning rush hour.

headlines.title: West Seattle Fireworks Mistaken for Gunfire
headlines.summary: Reports of possible gunfire in the Beach Drive/Alki area of West Seattle prompted multiple 911 calls. Seattle Police investigated and determined the sounds were fireworks, not gunfire. A parked ambulance crew confirmed seeing fireworks in the area.

headlines.title: Sea-Tac Airport Wrapping Up $399 Million Concourse C Expansion
headlines.summary: As the FIFA World Cup in Seattle draws near, Seattle-Tacoma International Airport is completing its roughly $399 million expansion project on Concourse C. The expansion will help accommodate increased passenger traffic for the major international event.

headlines.title: Seattle Community Members Gather to Discuss Youth and Gun Violence
headlines.summary: Nearly 50 community members gathered to discuss youth and gun violence, with speakers emphasizing that collaboration and trust-building offer hope for reducing violence affecting young people in Seattle. The meeting focused on finding community-based solutions.

headlines.title: Harbor Seal Recovering After Being Shot in Face
headlines.summary: A harbor seal is recovering after being shot in the face in the Seattle area. The incident is under investigation by authorities. Video coverage available on KIRO 7.

headlines.title: Vandals Slash Tires in Snohomish
headlines.summary: Vandals targeted vehicles in Snohomish, slashing tires in a recent incident. Local authorities are investigating the vandalism.

weather.forecast: Sunny and clear today with temperatures rising through the day. Perfect spring weather with no precipitation expected.
